plan.overview: Create src/input/signals.ts that reads language, timezone, screen dimensions, and devicePixelRatio from browser APIs, returning them as a typed in-memory object. No persistence, no transmission.

steps.description: Implement a readSignals() function that reads low-entropy browser signals and returns a typed BrowserSignals object.

implementation_notes: Pure function — no side effects, no storage, no fetch calls
All values read from standard browser APIs, kept in memory only

steps.description: Test that readSignals returns correct shape and values, and verify no forbidden storage APIs are used.

test_cases.name: returns language from navigator.language
test_cases.approach: Spy on navigator.language, call readSignals(), assert result.language matches

test_cases.name: returns timezone from Intl.DateTimeFormat
test_cases.approach: Call readSignals(), assert result.timezone is a non-empty string

test_cases.name: returns screen dimensions as positive numbers
test_cases.approach: Call readSignals(), assert screenWidth > 0 and screenHeight > 0

test_cases.name: returns devicePixelRatio when available
test_cases.approach: Call readSignals(), assert devicePixelRatio is a number or null

test_cases.name: returns null devicePixelRatio when undefined
test_cases.approach: Temporarily delete window.devicePixelRatio, call readSignals(), assert result.devicePixelRatio === null, restore

test_cases.name: does not access localStorage or sessionStorage
test_cases.approach: Spy on Storage.prototype.getItem/setItem, call readSignals(), assert not called

test_cases.name: does not set cookies
test_cases.approach: Spy on document.cookie setter, call readSignals(), assert not called

test_cases.name: all values are returned in a single object (in-memory only)
test_cases.approach: Assert readSignals() returns a plain object with exactly the expected keys

steps.description: Execute vitest and tsc build to confirm all tests pass, types are correct, and no console errors occur.

success_criteria: All new and existing tests pass
TypeScript compilation succeeds with no errors
No forbidden storage API usage detected

acceptance_criteria_mapping.All values stay in memory only: Pure function return, no storage/cookie/fetch calls, verified by privacy tests

risks.risk: jsdom may not fully implement navigator.language or Intl in test env
risks.mitigation: Use vi.spyOn or Object.defineProperty to mock missing APIs in tests
